calendarFaqs.q: How can I add Fresno Unified School District's school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: To add the Fresno Unified School District 2027-2028 calendar to Google Calendar, download the .ics file from this page, then open Google Calendar, go to Settings → Import & Export → Import, and upload the file. All school holidays, breaks, and key dates will appear on your calendar automatically.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Fresno Unified School District in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Fresno Unified School District is Monday, August 16, 2027. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Fresno Unified School District in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Fresno Unified School District is Friday, June 9, 2028. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2027-2028 for Fresno Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Fresno Unified School District runs Apr 10, 2028–Apr 17, 2028, 8 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2027-2028 for Fresno Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Fresno Unified School District runs Dec 20, 2027–Jan 7, 2028, 19 days. School resumes Jan 10, 2028.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Shifts
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break moves to April 10-17 from March 22-29 in 2026-2027 — nearly three weeks later, shifting from a late-March to a mid-April window.

yearNumbers.label: Extended Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break remains an 8-day break (April 10-17), a Fresno Unified signature that is longer than the standard 5-day break at most California districts.

yearNumbers.label: Extra No-School Day
yearNumbers.detail: A 'Not In Session' day falls on November 12 — the Friday after Veterans Day — creating a 4-day Veterans Day weekend not present in 2026-2027.

calendarNotes:
Fresno Unified begins the 2027–2028 school year on August 16, 2027 — earlier than most California districts, allowing the year to conclude before June's peak valley heat. Spring Break runs April 10–17, 2028. The school year ends June 9, 2028. Families relocating from districts that start after Labor Day should plan enrollment, childcare, and back-to-school shopping before mid-August.

The calendar includes California-specific no-school days — Lincoln's Birthday and Cesar Chavez Day — along with District Buyback Days when teachers attend professional development and students do not attend. The major multi-day breaks are Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break; Fresno Unified does not have a Fall Break.
